files.docSummary: Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
files.docBlock:
Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
pub/subs to react components via a tiny listener pattern. The dataset is
small (single-user, local) so keeping it in memory is fine.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
pub/subs to react components via a tiny listener pattern. The dataset is
small (single-user, local) so keeping it in memory is fine.

files.docSummary: Synthetic seed data — used by the "Seed with example data" empty-state
files.docBlock:
Synthetic seed data — used by the "Seed with example data" empty-state
action. Generates ~30 days of plausible sessions across 2 instruments
and 4 pieces so newcomers see populated stats immediately.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:

files.docSummary: Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
files.docBlock:
Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
IDs are short random base36 strings (no UUID dependency).
All timestamps are ISO 8601 strings unless otherwise noted.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
IDs are short random base36 strings (no UUID dependency).
All timestamps are ISO 8601 strings unless otherwise noted.

files.docSummary: Date helpers used throughout the app.
files.docBlock:
Date helpers used throughout the app.
All "day keys" are ISO date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) anchored to local time
so that "today" lines up with the user's calendar, not UTC.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
